title: Negative sentiment spike in Helldivers 2

evidence.content: I can't in good conscious recommend this game when Arrowhead has shown zero remorse for a man that lost his entire livelihood thanks to the toxic echo chamber they created through banning people in the official Helldiver's Discord for simply expressing their displeasure about the game's balance; eff
Some of the worst devs in the business. Save your money

Loved it at first, but the devs killed it.  They have a "vision" and will stick to it no matter what.  They accidentally created a really fun game, and then nerfed and "fixed" it into the ground.  One of the wildest ones was how flamethrowers were awesome, but they "fixed" them by enlarging the flam

Devs just allowed the community to ruin someone's life and just said "don't doxx people" instead of idk, maybe helping the person that's life was ruined, or maybe cracking down on the divers responsible. they now delete anything said about the situation and are trying to make everyone forget.
